commits.message: Add spark configuration

Generated by Spark: add universal visual movement & animations & 3-dimensional elements (exhaustively); Add animated badge unlock celebrations with confetti and rarity-specific visual effects; Create badge collection analytics dashboard showing earning patterns and completion percentages; Implement team badge trading marketplace with Al-powered trade recommendations;

Generated by Spark: Earn badges by completing transformations in Haircut Studio and Makeup Studio to fill your collection goals Set up automated daily digest notifications to track your badge progress and team challenge standings Use voice commands in team chat to coordinate badge trading strategies hands-free during styling sessions

Generated by Spark: Activate your first personalized collection goal and start earning badges towards completion Join a team collection challenge to compete against other teams for exclusive prizes Browse the badge marketplace to buy rare badges with credits or sell duplicates for profit

Generated by Spark: Activate a personalized badge collection goal and start collecting badges to complete it Join a team collection challenge and compete against other teams to complete badge sets first Browse the badge rarity marketplace to buy high-demand badges or sell your badges for credits
